title: Samsung's New Foldable Phones Drive Android Interest
description: Recent news coverage highlights Samsung's latest product launches impacting Android trends.

sources.title: Samsung ups prices as it launches new foldable smartphones ahead of expected Apple debut
Samsung’s wider Z Fold 8 feels just right
Samsung debuts 3 new foldable phones as Apple readies its own

sections.heading: New Product Launches
paragraphs: According to Yahoo Finance, Samsung has debuted three new foldable phones. CNBC reports that Samsung has increased prices as it launches these new foldable smartphones.

sections.heading: Device Design
paragraphs: The Verge reports that Samsung’s wider Z Fold 8 feels just right, based on a hands-on review.

sections.heading: Industry Context
paragraphs: CNBC states that these launches are occurring ahead of an expected Apple debut. Yahoo Finance also notes that Apple is readying its own device.

faq.q: What new devices has Samsung released?
faq.a: According to Yahoo Finance, Samsung has debuted three new foldable phones.

faq.q: How is the Samsung Z Fold 8 described?
faq.a: The Verge reports that the wider Z Fold 8 feels just right.

faq.q: Is Samsung changing its pricing strategy?
faq.a: CNBC reports that Samsung has ups prices as it launches new foldable smartphones.
